metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_146
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Using immuno- electron microscopy it is shown that PKC delta is present in the postsynaptic cytosol. No knockout control is provided. As control, the antibody was pre-absorbed against the immunizing peptide.

10/3/2017 Pim:
-Fig17E is guess this EM picture is difficult to asses (by me). Authors conclude: "Axon terminal (A) establishing multiple synaptic specializations (arrowheads) with a PKCG-i (PKC) dendrite (De)". Dendritic labeling close to synapses (arrow) is considered as "presynaptic".. Experimental description: Male CD/Sprague-Dawley rats (300-350g) were anesthe-tized with tribromoethanol(2.5 pg/lOO g body weight), and colchicine was injected into the lateral ventricle (Merchen-thaler, '90).

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
